[index (1).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28416922/index.1.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>GR Elektro Montage GbR - Kabelverlegung Frankfurt</title>
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{--navy:#0D1B2A;--navy2:#162032;--gold:#C9962A;--gold2:#E8B84B;--white:#fff;--offwhite:#F9F8F6;--lgrey:#C8C4BC;--mgrey:#666;--dgrey:#2D2D2D;--red:#B71C1C;--blue:#1565C0;--green:#1B5E20;--orange:#C45E00;--purple:#4A148C}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif;color:var(--dgrey);background:var(--white)}
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:999;background:var(--navy);border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 2rem;height:64px}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.nav-box{width:40px;height:40px;border:1.5px solid var(--gold);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--gold)}
.nav-name{color:var(--white);font-weight:700;font-size:15px;line-height:1.2}
.nav-name span{display:block;font-weight:400;font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.5px}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:1.8rem}
.nav-links a{color:var(--lgrey);text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;transition:color .2s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.nav-cta{background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);padding:8px 18px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;text-decoration:none}

/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;background:var(--navy);display:flex;align-items:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding-top:64px}
.hero-pattern{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 40px,rgba(201,150,42,.04) 40px,rgba(201,150,42,.04) 41px),repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,transparent 40px,rgba(201,150,42,.04) 40px,rgba(201,150,42,.04) 41px)}
.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:4rem 2rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:center}
.hero-badge{display:inline-block;background:rgba(201,150,42,.15);border:1px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--white);line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.hero h1 em{color:var(--gold);font-style:normal}
.hero-sub{font-size:16px;color:var(--lgrey);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:2rem}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-gold{background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);padding:14px 28px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;text-decoration:none}
.btn-outline{border:1.5px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold);padding:13px 28px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;text-decoration:none}
.hero-right{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem}
.hero-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(201,150,42,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem}
.hc-icon{width:44px;height:44px;background:rgba(201,150,42,.15);border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:20px}
.hc-text strong{display:block;color:var(--white);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px}
.hc-text span{color:var(--lgrey);font-size:12px}
.hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:.75rem}
.stat{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(201,150,42,.15);border-radius:6px;padding:1rem;text-align:center}
.stat-num{font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);display:block}
.stat-lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--lgrey);letter-spacing:.5px}

/* SECTIONS */
.sec{padding:5rem 2rem;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto}
.sec-badge{display:inline-block;background:#FEF3E0;color:var(--orange);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.2px;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:1rem}
.gold-line{width:50px;height:3px;background:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1.5rem;border-radius:2px}
.sec-title{font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3vw,2.4rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.5rem;line-height:1.2}
.sec-sub{font-size:15px;color:var(--mgrey);margin-bottom:3rem;max-width:560px}

/* LEISTUNGEN */
.l-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1.25rem}
.lcard{background:var(--offwhite);border-radius:8px;padding:1.5rem;border-left:4px solid var(--gold)}
.lcard.c-red{border-left-color:var(--red)}.lcard.c-blue{border-left-color:var(--blue)}
.lcard.c-green{border-left-color:var(--green)}.lcard.c-purple{border-left-color:var(--purple)}
.lcard.c-orange{border-left-color:var(--orange)}
.l-num{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--lgrey);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.l-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.l-spec{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.8rem}
.l-spec.c-red{color:var(--red)}.l-spec.c-blue{color:var(--blue)}.l-spec.c-green{color:var(--green)}
.l-spec.c-purple{color:var(--purple)}.l-spec.c-orange{color:var(--orange)}
.l-text{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--mgrey);line-height:1.6}

/* GALERIE */
.galerie-bg{background:var(--navy);padding:5rem 2rem}
.galerie-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto}
.gal-tabs{display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:2rem}
.gal-tab{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(201,150,42,.2);color:var(--lgrey);padding:8px 18px;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.gal-tab.active,.gal-tab:hover{background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);border-color:var(--gold)}
.gal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:1rem}
.gal-item{position:relative;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:4/3;cursor:pointer}
.gal-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .4s}
.gal-item:hover img{transform:scale(1.05)}
.gal-overlay{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(13,27,42,.9));padding:1.2rem 1rem .9rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.gal-item:hover .gal-overlay{opacity:1}
.gal-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.5px;display:block;margin-bottom:2px}
.gal-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--lgrey)}
.gal-featured{grid-column:span 2}
@media(max-width:640px){.gal-featured{grid-column:span 1}}

/* LIGHTBOX */
.lightbox{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);z-index:9999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:1rem}
.lightbox.open{display:flex}
.lb-img{max-width:90vw;max-height:85vh;border-radius:6px;object-fit:contain}
.lb-close{position:absolute;top:1.5rem;right:1.5rem;color:#fff;font-size:2rem;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;line-height:1}
.lb-caption{position:absolute;bottom:1.5rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);color:var(--lgrey);font-size:13px;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap}

/* WARUM */
.warum-bg{background:var(--navy);padding:5rem 2rem}
.warum-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto}
.w-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(230px,1fr));gap:1.25rem;margin-top:3rem}
.wcard{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(201,150,42,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:1.5rem}
.wcard-num{font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.75rem}
.wcard-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.wcard-text{font-size:13px;color:var(--lgrey);line-height:1.6}

/* SYSTEM */
.system-bg{background:var(--offwhite);padding:5rem 2rem}
.system-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto}
.sys-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(165px,1fr));gap:1rem;margin-top:3rem}
.scard{border-radius:8px;padding:1.5rem 1rem;text-align:center;color:#fff}
.scard.s-r{background:#B71C1C}.scard.s-b{background:#1565C0}
.scard.s-p{background:#4A148C}.scard.s-g{background:#1B5E20}.scard.s-d{background:#8B1A1A}
.s-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.3rem;line-height:1.3}
.s-spec{font-size:11px;opacity:.8;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.s-desc{font-size:11.5px;opacity:.85;line-height:1.5}

/* KONTAKT */
.kontakt-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start}
.kcard{background:var(--offwhite);border-radius:8px;padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;border-left:4px solid var(--gold);margin-bottom:1rem}
.k-icon{width:44px;height:44px;background:var(--navy);border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:20px}
.k-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--mgrey);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px}
.k-val{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy)}
.k-val a{color:var(--navy);text-decoration:none}
.tag-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.75rem}
.tag{background:var(--navy);color:var(--gold);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:3px}

/* FOOTER */
footer{background:var(--navy);border-top:2px solid var(--gold);padding:2rem;text-align:center}
.f-logo{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.f-logo span{color:var(--gold)}
.f-copy{font-size:11px;color:var(--mgrey);margin-top:.5rem}

@media(max-width:768px){
  .hero-content,.kontakt-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2rem}
  .hero-right{display:none}.nav-links{display:none}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">
    <div class="nav-box">GR</div>
    <div class="nav-name">GR Elektro Montage GbR<span>ELEKTROINSTALLATIONEN</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#leistungen">Leistungen</a>
    <a href="#galerie">Galerie</a>
    <a href="#warum">Warum wir</a>
    <a href="#system">Systemtrennung</a>
    <a href="#kontakt">Kontakt</a>
  </div>
  <a href="tel:+4917622676692" class="nav-cta">Jetzt anrufen</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-pattern"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-badge">ELEKTROINSTALLATIONEN &middot; FRANKFURT &amp; RHEIN-MAIN</div>
      <h1>Kabelverlegung.<br><em>Sauber. Getrennt.</em><br>Normgerecht.</h1>
      <p class="hero-sub">Starkstrom &middot; Schwachstrom &middot; Datenkabel Cat.7 &middot; KNX &middot; SIBE &amp; BMA mit E30/E90 Funktionserhalt-Kabel. Kurzfristig verfuegbar auf Grossbaustellen.</p>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <a href="tel:+4917622676692" class="btn-gold">+49 176 2267 6692</a>
        <a href="#galerie" class="btn-outline">Unsere Projekte</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right">
      <div class="hero-card"><div class="hc-icon">&#9889;</div><div class="hc-text"><strong>Starkstrom NYY / NHXMH</strong><span>Haupttrassen, Unterverteilung, 230V/400V</span></div></div>
      <div class="hero-card"><div class="hc-icon">&#128225;</div><div class="hc-text"><strong>Schwachstrom &amp; Datenkabel Cat.7</strong><span>Netzwerk, KNX-Bus, BMA-Leitungen</span></div></div>
      <div class="hero-card"><div class="hc-icon">&#128293;</div><div class="hc-text"><strong>SIBE &amp; BMA mit E30/E90</strong><span>Funktionserhalt-Kabel FE180 / NHXCH-J</span></div></div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">E30</span><span class="stat-lbl">FUNKTIONSERHALT</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">E90</span><span class="stat-lbl">BRANDSCHUTZ</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">VDE</span><span class="stat-lbl">NORMGERECHT</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LEISTUNGEN -->
<section id="leistungen">
<div class="sec">
  <div class="sec-badge">LEISTUNGEN</div>
  <div class="gold-line"></div>
  <h2 class="sec-title">Was wir anbieten</h2>
  <p class="sec-sub">Alle elektrotechnischen Gewerke aus einer Hand &ndash; fachgerecht und normgerecht.</p>
  <div class="l-grid">
    <div class="lcard"><div class="l-num">01</div><div class="l-title">Starkstrom</div><div class="l-spec">NYY &middot; NHXMH &middot; 230V / 400V</div><div class="l-text">Haupttrassen, Unterverteilung und Endstromkreise. Kabelverlegung ohne Anschluss nach VDE 0100.</div></div>
    <div class="lcard c-blue"><div class="l-num">02</div><div class="l-title">Schwachstrom &amp; IT</div><div class="l-spec c-blue">J-H(St)H &middot; Cat.7 &middot; BMA</div><div class="l-text">Netzwerk, Telefon, BMA-Leitungen und Steuerkabel auf eigenen Schwachstrom-Trassen.</div></div>
    <div class="lcard c-orange"><div class="l-num">03</div><div class="l-title">Datenkabel Cat.7</div><div class="l-spec c-orange">Cat.7 &middot; LWL &middot; Patchkabel</div><div class="l-text">Strukturierte Verkabelung, Datendosen, Cat.7 Netzwerkkabel und Lichtwellenleiter.</div></div>
    <div class="lcard c-purple"><div class="l-num">04</div><div class="l-title">KNX-Bus</div><div class="l-spec c-purple">J-Y(St)Y 2x2x0,8</div><div class="l-text">Intelligente Gebaeudetechnik. KNX/EIB Busleitungen und Aktoren-Vorbereitung.</div></div>
    <div class="lcard c-green"><div class="l-num">05</div><div class="l-title">SIBE / Notlicht</div><div class="l-spec c-green">E30/E90 &middot; FE180 &middot; NHXCH-J</div><div class="l-text">Sicherheitsbeleuchtung mit Funktionserhalt-Kabel. Stromversorgung bleibt im Brandfall aufrecht.</div></div>
    <div class="lcard c-red"><div class="l-num">06</div><div class="l-title">BMA / EMA</div><div class="l-spec c-red">E30/E90 &middot; FE180 &middot; NHXMH-J</div><div class="l-text">Brandmeldeanlagen und Evakuierungssysteme mit E30/E90 Funktionserhalt-Kabel.</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- GALERIE -->
<section id="galerie" class="galerie-bg">
  <div class="galerie-inner">
    <div class="sec-badge" style="background:rgba(201,150,42,.15);color:var(--gold)">PROJEKTFOTOS</div>
    <div class="gold-line"></div>
    <h2 class="sec-title" style="color:#fff">Unsere Arbeit</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub" style="color:var(--lgrey)">Einblicke in unsere Projekte &ndash; Starkstrom, Schwachstrom, Datenkabel, KNX, SIBE und BMA.</p>

    <div class="gal-tabs">
      <button class="gal-tab active" onclick="filterGal('all',this)">Alle</button>
      <button class="gal-tab" onclick="filterGal('stark',this)">Starkstrom</button>
      <button class="gal-tab" onclick="filterGal('schwach',this)">Schwachstrom / IT</button>
      <button class="gal-tab" onclick="filterGal('trassen',this)">Kabeltrassen</button>
      <button class="gal-tab" onclick="filterGal('finish',this)">Endmontage</button>
    </div>

    <div class="gal-grid" id="galGrid">
      <div class="gal-item gal-featured" data-cat="stark" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Starkstrom - Hauptsteigetrasse NYY/NHXMH mit Rohrschellen nach VDE 0100-520')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Starkstrom Haupttrasse" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">STARKSTROM</span><span class="gal-desc">Hauptsteigetrasse &middot; NYY/NHXMH &middot; Rohrschellen nach VDE 0100-520</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="stark" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Starkstromkabel orange im Steigeschacht - gebundelt und befestigt')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Starkstrom Schacht" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">STARKSTROM</span><span class="gal-desc">Steigeschacht &middot; Buendelung &amp; Befestigung</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="stark" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Starkstromkabel auf Kabeltrassen mit Abzweigungen')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Starkstrom Trassen" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">STARKSTROM</span><span class="gal-desc">Kabeltrassen &middot; Abzweigungen &middot; Unterverteilung</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="trassen" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Kabeltrassen mit orangen Starkstromkabeln und Schwachstromleiter getrennt')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Kabeltrassen" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">KABELTRASSEN</span><span class="gal-desc">Getrennte Fuerung &middot; Stark- und Schwachstrom</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item gal-featured" data-cat="schwach" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Schwachstromkabel Reserveschlaufen auf Kabelleiter - Cat.7, KNX, BMA')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Schwachstrom Schlaufen" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">SCHWACHSTROM / IT</span><span class="gal-desc">Kabelreserven &middot; Cat.7 &middot; KNX &middot; BMA-Leitungen</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="schwach" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','IT und BMS Kabeltrassen - saubere Trassenführung')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="IT Trassen" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">IT / BMS</span><span class="gal-desc">Saubere Trassen &middot; System getrennt</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="schwach" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Farbige Steuerkabel - KNX blau, DALI rot, BMA weiss')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Farbige Kabel" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">KNX / DALI / BMA</span><span class="gal-desc">Farbig getrennt &middot; beschriftet</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="schwach" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Datenkabel Cat.7 auf Kabelleiter mit Schwachstromkabeln')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Datenkabel Cat.7" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">DATENKABEL CAT.7</span><span class="gal-desc">Kabelleiter &middot; Schwachstromtrasse</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="trassen" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Elektroverteilerraum mit Kabelwannen und Schaltschraenken')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Verteilerraum" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">VERTEILERRAUM</span><span class="gal-desc">Kabelwannen &middot; Schaltschraenke &middot; Hauptverteilung</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="trassen" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Gesamtansicht Deckeninstallation mit allen Gewerken')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Gesamtansicht" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">GESAMTANSICHT</span><span class="gal-desc">Deckeninstallation &middot; alle Gewerke koordiniert</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="finish" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','LED Lichtband und Rauchwarnmelder montiert und verkabelt')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="LED Lichtband Rauchmelder" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">SIBE / EMA</span><span class="gal-desc">LED-Lichtband &middot; Rauchmelder &middot; Notlicht verkabelt</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gal-item" data-cat="finish" onclick="openLb('data:image/jpeg;base64,','Bruestungskanal mit Schuko Steckdosen und Cat.7 Datendosen fertig montiert')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Bruestungskanal" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gal-overlay"><span class="gal-label">ENDMONTAGE</span><span class="gal-desc">Bruestungskanal &middot; Schuko &middot; Cat.7 Datendosen</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lb" onclick="closeLb()">
  <button class="lb-close" onclick="closeLb()">&times;</button>
  <img class="lb-img" id="lbImg" src="" alt="">
  <div class="lb-caption" id="lbCap"></div>
</div>

<!-- WARUM -->
<section id="warum" class="warum-bg">
  <div class="warum-inner">
    <div class="sec-badge" style="background:rgba(201,150,42,.15);color:var(--gold)">WARUM GR ELEKTRO MONTAGE</div>
    <div class="gold-line"></div>
    <h2 class="sec-title" style="color:#fff">Ihr verlaesslicher Partner</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub" style="color:var(--lgrey)">Was uns auf Grossbaustellen auszeichnet.</p>
    <div class="w-grid">
      <div class="wcard"><div class="wcard-num">01</div><div class="wcard-title">Kurzfristig verfuegbar</div><div class="wcard-text">Schnelle Einsatzbereitschaft und flexible Terminplanung. Wir sind da wenn Sie uns brauchen.</div></div>
      <div class="wcard"><div class="wcard-num">02</div><div class="wcard-title">Zuverlaessig &amp; professionell</div><div class="wcard-text">Sauber, termingerecht und loesungsorientiert. Unsere Arbeit spricht fuer sich.</div></div>
      <div class="wcard"><div class="wcard-num">03</div><div class="wcard-title">Normgerecht &amp; sicher</div><div class="wcard-text">Verlegung nach VDE 0100-520, DIN 4102-12 und aktuellen Brandschutznormen.</div></div>
      <div class="wcard"><div class="wcard-num">04</div><div class="wcard-title">Grossbaustellen-Erfahrung</div><div class="wcard-text">Industrie, Gewerbe und oeffentliche Projekte. Wir kennen die Ablaeufe.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SYSTEMTRENNUNG -->
<section id="system" class="system-bg">
  <div class="system-inner">
    <div class="sec-badge">SYSTEMTRENNUNG</div>
    <div class="gold-line"></div>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Jedes Gewerk auf eigener Trasse</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Fuer maximale Sicherheit werden alle Systeme strikt getrennt gefuehrt. Keine Mischung &ndash; keine Kompromisse.</p>
    <div class="sys-grid">
      <div class="scard s-r"><div class="s-title">STARKSTROM<br>NYY / NHXMH</div><div class="s-spec">230V / 400V</div><div class="s-desc">Haupttrassen und Unterverteilung</div></div>
      <div class="scard s-b"><div class="s-title">IT-KABEL<br>Cat.7 / LWL</div><div class="s-spec">Netzwerk &amp; Daten</div><div class="s-desc">Strukturierte Verkabelung</div></div>
      <div class="scard s-p"><div class="s-title">KNX-BUS<br>J-Y(St)Y</div><div class="s-spec">Gebaeudeautomation</div><div class="s-desc">Busleitungen &amp; Aktoren</div></div>
      <div class="scard s-g"><div class="s-title">SIBE / NOTLICHT<br>E30/E90</div><div class="s-spec">FE180 / NHXCH-J</div><div class="s-desc">Funktionserhalt im Brandfall</div></div>
      <div class="scard s-d"><div class="s-title">BMA / BRAND-<br>MELDUNG E30/E90</div><div class="s-spec">NHXMH-J / FE180</div><div class="s-desc">Rauch- &amp; Waermemelder</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- KONTAKT -->
<section id="kontakt">
<div class="sec">
  <div class="kontakt-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="sec-badge">KONTAKT</div>
      <div class="gold-line"></div>
      <h2 class="sec-title">Jetzt Kontakt aufnehmen</h2>
      <p class="sec-sub">Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Anfrage. Kurzfristig verfuegbar im Raum Frankfurt &amp; Rhein-Main.</p>
      <div class="kcard"><div class="k-icon">&#128222;</div><div><div class="k-label">TELEFON</div><div class="k-val"><a href="tel:+4917622676692">+49 176 2267 6692</a></div></div></div>
      <div class="kcard"><div class="k-icon">&#9993;</div><div><div class="k-label">E-MAIL</div><div class="k-val"><a href="mailto:gr_elekro_montage@yahoo.com">gr_elekro_montage@yahoo.com</a></div></div></div>
      <div class="kcard"><div class="k-icon">&#128100;</div><div><div class="k-label">INHABER</div><div class="k-val">Gabriel Casaneanu</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--mgrey);margin-bottom:.75rem;letter-spacing:.5px">EINSATZGEBIET</div>
      <div class="tag-wrap"><span class="tag">Frankfurt</span><span class="tag">Offenbach</span><span class="tag">Wiesbaden</span><span class="tag">Darmstadt</span><span class="tag">Mainz</span><span class="tag">Hanau</span><span class="tag">Bad Homburg</span><span class="tag">Rhein-Main</span><span class="tag">Hessen</span></div>
      <div style="margin-top:2rem;background:var(--navy);border-radius:8px;padding:2rem">
        <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1rem;letter-spacing:.5px">UNSERE GEWERKE</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;color:var(--lgrey);font-size:13.5px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;background:#B71C1C;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0"></span>Starkstrom NYY / NHXMH</div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;color:var(--lgrey);font-size:13.5px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;background:#1565C0;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0"></span>Schwachstrom &amp; Datenkabel Cat.7</div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;color:var(--lgrey);font-size:13.5px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;background:#4A148C;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0"></span>KNX-Bus J-Y(St)Y</div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;color:var(--lgrey);font-size:13.5px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;background:#1B5E20;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0"></span>SIBE / Notlicht cu E30/E90</div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;color:var(--lgrey);font-size:13.5px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;background:#8B1A1A;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0"></span>BMA / EMA cu E30/E90</div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;color:var(--lgrey);font-size:13.5px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0"></span>Kabelverlegung ohne Anschluss</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="f-logo">GR <span>Elektro Montage</span> GbR</div>
  <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--lgrey);margin:.5rem 0">Starkstrom &middot; Schwachstrom &middot; Cat.7 &middot; KNX &middot; SIBE / BMA &middot; E30/E90 &middot; Raum Frankfurt</div>
  <div class="f-copy">&copy; 2026 GR Elektro Montage GbR &middot; Gabriel Casaneanu &middot; +49 176 2267 6692</div>
</footer>

<script>
function filterGal(cat, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.gal-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.gal-item').forEach(item => {
    if (cat === 'all' || item.dataset.cat === cat) {
      item.style.display = '';
    } else {
      item.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });
}
function openLb(src, cap) {
  document.getElementById('lbImg').src = src;
  document.getElementById('lbCap').textContent = cap;
  document.getElementById('lb').classList.add('open');
}
function closeLb() {
  document.getElementById('lb').classList.remove('open');
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if(e.key==='Escape') closeLb(); });
</script>
</body>
</html>
